## Overview

`defenseclaw settings` — Operator settings (parity with the TUI setup panel save path).

### Description

Operator settings (parity with the TUI setup panel save path)

### `defenseclaw settings save`

Write the current resolved configuration to disk and record an activity event

<!-- END AUTOGEN:cli_py:settings -->

## Usage

### Persist interactive settings

```bash
defenseclaw settings save
```

This command writes the current CLI settings through the same config path used by the setup commands.
